name: react-example
description: NOVA-X: Core Command Desktop Station & Automated Updates Pipeline
author: Tehzeeb (xtehzeeb.x)

scripts.build: vite build && esbuild electron/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:electron --outfile=dist-electron/main.cjs && esbuild electron/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:electron --outfile=dist-electron/preload.cjs
scripts.electron:build: vite build && esbuild electron/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:electron --outfile=dist-electron/main.cjs && esbuild electron/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:electron --outfile=dist-electron/preload.cjs && electron-builder
